data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the virtual queue option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the virtual queue option, specifically whether customers can take a number remotely and arrive when close. However, the evidence provided does not include any API responses or state checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for a virtual queue option, but lacks concrete evidence of how this is achieved or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API responses or state checks validating the virtual queue option functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the virtual queue option.
